coreIssue: This check-in is likely about how Carl is exercising lead-level ownership to restore momentum and direction in the CoE.
openingQuestion: What would keeping the CoE meaningfully moving over the next few weeks look like from your side, and where is it getting stuck?
listenFor: whether he names one or two concrete CoE bets instead of speaking in broad themes
whether he points to a specific partner or forum where alignment on CoE work is slipping
if they describe who owns each CoE thread now or stay vague about delegated ownership
avoid: do not turn this into a critique of everything the CoE has not delivered
do not jump straight into prescribing priorities before you hear how Carl sees the CoE's role and current drag
goodOutcome: You and Carl have agreed one lead-level CoE priority he will actively steer end-to-end, with clear ownership boundaries for what he delegates versus drives himself.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent example where the CoE lost momentum or visibility so you can test specifics instead of speaking in general impressions.
